mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, V.* FROM ( SELECT vendor_id AS vendorId, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_type AS vendorType, vendor_tel AS vendorTel, vendor_email AS vendorEmail, vendor_zipcode AS vendorZipcode, vendor_addr AS vendorAddr, vendor_addr_detail AS vendorAddrDetail, vendor_usage AS vendorUsage FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY vendor_id DESC ) V ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vendor ( vendor_id, vendor_name, vendor_type, vendor_tel, vendor_email, vendor_zipcode, vendor_addr, vendor_addr_detail, vendor_usage ) VALUES ( 'VD' || LPAD(SEQ_VENDOR.NEXTVAL, 4, '0'), #{vendorName}, #{vendorType}, #{vendorTel}, #{vendorEmail}, #{vendorZipcode}, #{vendorAddr}, #{vendorAddrDetail}, 'Y' )
